candidates.why: Both Operating revenue and Total Revenue have identical values, but Total Revenue is the clearer explicit total top-line label.
Explicitly labeled as Total Revenue and matches Operating revenue figures; preferred as the canonical top-line revenue measure.

variables.notes: No cost of goods sold or equivalent cost of sales line is present in the candidate list.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket; not labeled as a total and distinct from depreciation/impairment lines. Suitable SG&A-type component in absence of explicit SG&A line.
Typical SG&A-style overhead bucket; excludes COGS, interest, and taxes, and is not a total/subtotal.
Administrative expenses are classic SG&A; clearly overhead and not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: No research & development related line appears in the candidate list.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line in the income statement; best measure of interest cost.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest expense; should not be used for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of interest on lease liabilities; secondary to the main Interest Expense line for XINT selection.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders; not an interest expense.
Duplicate concept of Non-Controlling Interests; not an interest expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not the P&L expense; secondary to income statement Interest Expense for XINT.
Component of equity but not the full book equity total; prefer a comprehensive total equity line for BE.
Subcomponent of equity; not the full book equity measure.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; viable BE measure but slightly narrower label than Total Equity which already includes this and non-controlling interests.
Explicit overall equity total; best representation of book equity for BE.
Technical balancing line, not appropriate as BE.
Balancing row, not the actual equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line; not a pure equity figure.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity; not appropriate for BE which should be equity only.
Represents minority interest share of period income (flow), but MIB should reflect the balance sheet minority equity position if available.
Balance sheet minority equity position; best match for MIB (minority interest / non-controlling interests).
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests; same concept and values as Non-Controlling Interests.
Income statement allocation of profit to minorities; flow, not stock. Balance sheet item preferred for MIB.
